---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.
Example: "I always have to scroll to find a specific task when I have many cards..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other ways this could be solved?

## Additional context

Any mockups, screenshots, or references to similar features in other tools.
